# Repository-level Copilot Instructions

When working in this repository:

- Treat `agents/` as the primary catalog of specialized agents.
- Treat `skills/` as reusable capability modules shared by agents.
- Treat `instructions/` as shared operating rules and authoring guidance.
- Keep agent prompts focused on outcomes, constraints, and workflows.
- Prefer referencing reusable skills instead of duplicating guidance.
- When creating a new agent, also update the relevant manifest files.
- Preserve the existing folder structure and naming conventions.
- Keep prompts concise, operational, and easy to compose.
- Include at least one usage example for every new agent.
- Favor safe, maintainable automation advice over clever but fragile solutions.
